task_completion.description: Create a WordPress page with the correct title
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the title 'Urban Photography Book Launch' in the WordPress page editor's title field or at the top of the published page.

task_completion.description: Add a Cover block with the background image and heading
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a WordPress Cover block featuring a background image (hero-bg.jpg) with the heading text 'The Art of Urban Photography' overlaid on it.
Look for a paragraph block containing introductory text placed below the cover section.
Look for a YouTube video player embedded in the page content.

task_completion.description: Create a three-column layout for the pricing tiers
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a WordPress Columns block configured with three columns, containing text references to 'Tier 1', 'Tier 2', and 'Tier 3'.

task_completion.description: Add a 'Pre-order Now' button linking to checkout
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a WordPress Button block with the text 'Pre-order Now'. If the block settings or link popup is visible, verify the link points to '/checkout/'.
Look for the 'Published' status, a disabled 'Publish' button, or an active 'Update' button in the top right of the WordPress editor, or evidence that the live page is being viewed outside the editor.

integrity.description: Agent used the WordPress Gutenberg editor GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the web browser with the WordPress block editor interface, not a terminal or text editor writing raw HTML/SQL.

integrity.description: Agent actually uploaded/embedded the media rather than just typing filenames
integrity.visual_evidence: The image should be visibly rendered in the cover block and the video should appear as an actual embedded player, not just text saying 'hero-bg.jpg' or a plain text URL.

integrity.description: Agent did not use WP-CLI or database scripts to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should show step-by-step block assembly in the browser, rather than terminal commands executing scripts to generate the page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The page title must be exactly 'Urban Photography Book Launch' and its status must be 'publish'. The cover block must use an uploaded image (hero-bg.jpg). The embedded video should be a YouTube video (URL containing 'youtube.com/watch'). The call-to-action button must say 'Pre-order Now' and link to '/checkout/'.
